requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容标准——OSIM产品标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容標準——OSIM產品標準

summary.en: The Office of Standards, Inspection and Metrology (OSIM — 국가품질감독위원회) is the DPRK body responsible for product safety and electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) standards. OSIM administers national product standards (KS — Korean Standards) which are largely derived from or aligned with international IEC/CISPR standards. For wireless devices permitted under sanctions exemptions, OSIM conformity documentation would be required alongside MIC type approval. OSIM inspection and testing must be conducted through authorised channels; no independent third-party certification body operates openly in the DPRK.
summary.zh: 国家标准检验计量委员会（OSIM——국가품질감독위원회）是负责产品安全和电磁兼容（EMC）标准的DPRK机构。OSIM管理国家产品标准（KS——朝鲜标准），这些标准在很大程度上源自或与IEC/CISPR国际标准接轨。对于在制裁豁免下获准的无线设备，需在取得MIC型号核准的同时提交OSIM合规文件。OSIM检验和测试须通过授权渠道进行；目前无独立第三方认证机构在DPRK境内公开运营。
summary.zht: 國家標準檢驗計量委員會（OSIM——국가품질감독위원회）是負責產品安全和電磁相容（EMC）標準的DPRK機構。OSIM管理國家產品標準（KS——朝鮮標準），這些標準在很大程度上源自或與IEC/CISPR國際標準接軌。對於在制裁豁免下獲准的無線設備，需在取得MIC型號核准的同時提交OSIM合規文件。OSIM檢驗和測試須通過授權渠道進行；目前無獨立第三方認證機構在DPRK境內公開運營。

standards_or_laws: OSIM (국가품질감독위원회) — DPRK national product standards administration
KS (Korean Standards — 조선표준) — DPRK national standards aligned with IEC/CISPR
CISPR 32, CISPR 35 — EMC standards for multimedia equipment (international reference)

summary.en: China requires EMC conformity under the CCC compulsory certification system and GB EMC standards (aligned with CISPR). MIIT type approval includes EMC testing. GB/T 9254 (CISPR 32) covers emissions for multimedia equipment; GB/T 17618 (CISPR 35) covers immunity.
summary.zh: 中国要求在CCC强制性认证体系和GB电磁兼容标准（与CISPR接轨）下满足电磁兼容合规要求。MIIT型号核准包含EMC测试。GB/T 9254（CISPR 32）涵盖多媒体设备的发射要求，GB/T 17618（CISPR 35）涵盖抗扰度要求。
summary.zht: 中國要求在CCC強制性認證體系和GB電磁相容標準（與CISPR接軌）下滿足電磁相容合規要求。MIIT型號核准包含EMC測試。GB/T 9254（CISPR 32）涵蓋多媒體設備的發射要求，GB/T 17618（CISPR 35）涵蓋抗擾度要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 (aligned with CISPR 32) — EMC emissions for multimedia equipment
GB/T 17618 (aligned with CISPR 35) — EMC immunity for multimedia equipment
CCC compulsory certification — includes EMC evaluation
MIIT radio type approval — includes EMC and spurious emissions

gap.en: Chinese CCC EMC test reports and GB standard conformity are not recognised by OSIM. DPRK applies its own KS national standards. Practical access to OSIM testing and certification is severely limited by the sanctions environment and the closed nature of DPRK institutions.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电磁兼容测试报告及GB标准合规证明不被OSIM认可。DPRK适用其自身的KS国家标准。在制裁环境以及DPRK机构封闭性的制约下，获取OSIM测试和认证在实践中受到严重限制。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電磁相容測試報告及GB標準合規證明不被OSIM認可。DPRK適用其自身的KS國家標準。在制裁環境以及DPRK機構封閉性的制約下，獲取OSIM測試和認證在實踐中受到嚴重限制。

mandatory_status.target: Required for permitted devices (sanctions authorisation required first)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese EMC certifications (CCC, GB standards) are not recognised by OSIM. DPRK national standards (KS) apply for any permitted device. Access to OSIM conformity procedures is practically unavailable to most exporters given the comprehensive sanctions environment. Exporters must obtain explicit sanctions authorisation before considering any DPRK regulatory engagement. This row is provided for compliance awareness only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电磁兼容认证（CCC、GB标准）不被OSIM认可。对于任何获准设备，须适用DPRK国家标准（KS）。鉴于全面的制裁环境，大多数出口商实际上无法获得OSIM合规程序的支持。出口商在考虑任何DPRK监管事务前，必须先取得明确的制裁授权。本条目仅供合规意识参考。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電磁相容認證（CCC、GB標準）不被OSIM認可。對於任何獲准設備，須適用DPRK國家標準（KS）。鑑於全面的制裁環境，大多數出口商實際上無法獲得OSIM合規程序的支持。出口商在考慮任何DPRK監管事務前，必須先取得明確的制裁授權。本條目僅供合規意識參考。

requirement_topic.zh: 光明网内联网兼容性——网络接入
requirement_topic.zht: 光明網內聯網相容性——網路接入

summary.en: North Korea operates Kwangmyong (광명), a domestic intranet separate from the global internet, administered under MIC oversight. Wireless devices intended for use on any authorised DPRK network must be compatible with Kwangmyong protocols and approved by MIC for network access. Commercial internet access is not available to the general public; very limited external connectivity exists for approved government and institutional users. Any device connecting to DPRK network infrastructure would require MIC authorisation specific to the network environment.
summary.zh: 朝鲜运营光明网（광명），这是一个由MIC监管、独立于全球互联网的国内内联网。计划接入任何授权DPRK网络的无线设备须与光明网协议兼容，并取得MIC的网络接入核准。一般公众无法获得商业互联网接入；仅有极其有限的外部连接供经批准的政府及机构用户使用。任何接入DPRK网络基础设施的设备均须针对特定网络环境取得MIC授权。
summary.zht: 北韓運營光明網（광명），這是一個由MIC監管、獨立於全球互聯網的國內內聯網。計劃接入任何授權DPRK網路的無線設備須與光明網協議相容，並取得MIC的網路接入核准。一般公眾無法獲得商業互聯網接入；僅有極其有限的外部連接供經批准的政府及機構用戶使用。任何接入DPRK網路基礎設施的設備均須針對特定網路環境取得MIC授權。

standards_or_laws: DPRK Telecommunications Law (전기통신법) — network access provisions
UN UNSCR 2270 (2016), UNSCR 2371 (2017) — dual-use electronics restrictions

summary.en: China requires MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment connecting to public networks. Equipment must comply with relevant YD/T telecom standards. China operates its own regulated internet environment (Great Firewall) but provides public commercial internet access.
summary.zh: 中国要求接入公共网络的电信终端设备须取得工业和信息化部网络接入许可证（NAL）。设备须符合相关YD/T电信标准。中国运营有其自身受监管的互联网环境（防火长城），但向公众提供商业互联网接入。
summary.zht: 中國要求接入公共網路的電信終端設備須取得工業和信息化部網路接入許可證（NAL）。設備須符合相關YD/T電信標準。中國運營有其自身受監管的互聯網環境（防火長城），但向公眾提供商業互聯網接入。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) — telecom terminal equipment
YD/T series — China telecom terminal equipment standards
MIIT Order No. 52 (2019) — network equipment access management

gap.en: Chinese MIIT NAL has no recognition in the DPRK. Kwangmyong operates on a closed architecture with no public documentation of technical standards. Network access authorisation is entirely within MIC discretion and is practically inaccessible to foreign exporters under the current sanctions environment.
gap.zh: 中国MIIT NAL在DPRK不具备任何认可效力。光明网采用封闭架构运行，没有关于技术标准的公开文件。网络接入授权完全由MIC自由裁量，在当前制裁环境下，境外出口商实际上无法获得此类授权。
gap.zht: 中國MIIT NAL在DPRK不具備任何認可效力。光明網採用封閉架構運行，沒有關於技術標準的公開文件。網路接入授權完全由MIC自由裁量，在當前制裁環境下，境外出口商實際上無法獲得此類授權。

mandatory_status.target: Required for network-connected devices (sanctions authorisation required first)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kwangmyong network access requires MIC-specific authorisation with no equivalence to Chinese MIIT NAL. The closed architecture of DPRK network infrastructure and the comprehensive sanctions environment make network-connected device exports practically impossible for most exporters. This row is provided for compliance awareness only; no commercial guidance is implied.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 光明网网络接入需要MIC专项授权，与中国MIIT NAL不存在等效关系。DPRK网络基础设施的封闭架构和全面的制裁环境，使得大多数出口商在实践中几乎不可能出口网络联接设备。本条目仅供合规意识参考，不含任何商业指引。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 光明網網路接入需要MIC專項授權，與中國MIIT NAL不存在等效關係。DPRK網路基礎設施的封閉架構和全面的制裁環境，使得大多數出口商在實踐中幾乎不可能出口網路聯接設備。本條目僅供合規意識參考，不含任何商業指引。
